_description: Tier 2: Interactive FAQ accordion with scoped JS. POST to /api/v1/dashboard/content/components
name: FAQ Accordion

items.question: How does it work?
items.answer: Sign up for a free account, connect your data sources, and deploy your site in under 5 minutes.

items.question: What's included in the free tier?
items.answer: The free tier includes 5 pages, 1 custom domain, and unlimited visitors. No credit card required.

items.question: Can I use my own domain?
items.answer: Yes! Add your domain in the dashboard, point your DNS to our servers, and SSL is provisioned automatically.
